# ITransaction&lt;TEntity&gt;.Steps property

A series of sets of modifiers for a set of entities.

```csharp
public ImmutableArray<ITransactionStep<TEntity>> Steps { get; }
```

## Remarks

`Steps` must be handled in the order they are given.
